docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY GHNAIM, NED SUPER K MARKET AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL INSURANCE CO. KAPLUNOV, GENNADY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
